CustomField.inlineHelpText: check if this if previous AA extended controls at a resale for 30 new years but it does not count as a new credit b/c the original period did not expire. ie, 30 year control period started on 1/1/2000, it sold on 1/1/2010 and controls were extended 30 years to 1/1/2040. The total control period is only 40 years even though it was extended.
CustomField.label: controls extended NO NEW CREDIT?
